-- MIB version 1.0.0

AVAYA-AURA-CM-MIB DEFINITIONS ::= BEGIN

IMPORTS
	OBJECT-TYPE, Integer32, enterprises, MODULE-IDENTITY
		FROM SNMPv2-SMI
	MODULE-COMPLIANCE, OBJECT-GROUP
		FROM SNMPv2-CONF
	SnmpAdminString
		FROM SNMP-FRAMEWORK-MIB;

avCmMib MODULE-IDENTITY
    LAST-UPDATED "201505050000Z"		-- 05 May 2015, midnight
    ORGANIZATION "Avaya Inc"
    CONTACT-INFO "	Avaya Customer Services
			postal:	Avaya, Inc
				211 Mt Airy Rd.
				Basking Ridge, NJ 07920
				USA
		 "
    DESCRIPTION	 "Avaya Aura Communication Manager MIB."

    REVISION	 "201505050000Z"
    DESCRIPTION	 "No revisions"

    ::= { avCommMgrMibs 8 }

avaya			OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { enterprises 6889 }
products		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avaya 1 }
mibs			OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avaya 2 }
avCommMgrProd		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { products 73 }
avCommMgrMibs		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { mibs 73 }

avCmNotification	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmMib 0 }
avCmObjects		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmMib 1 }
avCmConformance		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmMib 2 }

-- Notifications are not supported in this MIB. Notifications
-- are defined in the AVAYA-AURA-CMALARM-MIB

-- DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION

--	REF_DOC_1:	Maintenance Commands for Avaya Aura
--			Communication Manager, Media Gateways and Servers.

--	REF_DOC_2:	Avaya Aura Communication Manager Server Alarms.

--	REF_DOC_3:	Maintenance Commands for Avaya Aura Communication
--			Manager, Branch Gateways and Servers.

--	REF_DOC_4:	Avaya Aura Communication Manager Reports.

--	REF_DOC_5:	Administering Avaya Aura Communication Manager.

--  The above reference documents can be downloaded from:

--	http://support.avaya.com/documents/

-- Each Mib Group has documentation about it embedded as comments.

-- Types of fields.

--	Single   	Field corresponds to 1 FID.
--	Multiple   	Field corresponds to multiple FIDs.

-- Types of polling:

--	Configuration
--	Fault
--	Inventory
--	Performance/Utilization
--	Security

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Product Identifiers
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

avayaAuraCmSp           OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCommMgrProd 1 }
avayaAuraCmVe		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCommMgrProd 2 }

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Objects Information
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- *************************** avCmVersion Group ***********************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmVersion
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1
-- Description:
--		The avCmVersion MIB Group displays the output of the "swversion"
--		command. The "swversion" command displays the Servers Software
--		Version information
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		60 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. swversion
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. CM Software Version
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmVersion		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 1 }

avCmVersionOperSystem	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..50))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionOperSystem
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Operating System
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the operating system
			running on the Server.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 1 }

avCmVersionBuildDate	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..25))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionBuildDate
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Built:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the build date.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 2 }

avCmVersionLoadNumber	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..15))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionLoadNumber
	Fld  OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Contains:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the current CM load number
			running on the server.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 3 }

avCmVersionRlsNumber	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..25))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionRlsNumber
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.4
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	CM Reports as:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the current CM Release number
			running on the server.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 4 }

avCmVersionRlsString	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..25))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionRlsString
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.5
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	CM Release String:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the CM Release string.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 5 }

avCmVersionVMToolsVers	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..28))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionVMToolsVers
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.6
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	VMwaretools version
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the VMwaretools version string
			(Only displayed on VMware platform).
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 6 }

avCmVersionTransSaved	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..20))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionTransSaved
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.7
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	CM Translation Saved:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the date and time that
			translations were last saved on the CM server.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 7 }

avCmVersionLicInstalled	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..20))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmVersionLicInstalled
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.8
	Fld Form/Rpt:	CM Software Version
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	CM License Installed:
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the date and time that the
			license was installed on the CM server.
	"
    ::= { avCmVersion 8 }

avCmVersionMemConfig OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX      SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..20))
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmVersionMemConfig
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.1.9
        Fld Form/Rpt:   CM Software Version
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    CM Memory Config: 
        Fld Descr:      An object containing the memory configuration
                        on the CM server.
        "
    ::= { avCmVersion 9 }


--   ***********	 avCmServerAlarm Group       **************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmServerAlarm
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2
-- Description:
--		The avCmServerAlarm MIB Group displays the output of the
--		"almdisplay -serv -w" command.  The "almdisplay -serv -w"
--		displays all active server alarms.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Fault
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		90 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. almdisplay -serv -w
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. Server Alarms
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmServerAlarm		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 2 }

avCmServerAlarmTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmServerAlarmEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmServerAlarms entries
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarm 1 }

avCmServerAlarmEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmServerAlarmEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmServerAlarm entry containing objects of the
			avCmServerAlarm information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmServerAlarmIdx }
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmTable 1 }

AvCmServerAlarmEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmServerAlarmIdx
		    Integer32,
		avCmServerAlarmID
		    Integer32,
		avCmServerAlarmSource
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmServerAlarmEventID
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmServerAlarmLevel
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmServerAlarmAck
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmServerAlarmDate
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmServerAlarmDescription
		    SnmpAdminString
		}
avCmServerAlarmIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..400)
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.1
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object that uniquely identifies each Server Alarm.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 1 }

avCmServerAlarmID	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..400)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmID
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	ID
	Fld Descr:	An object that uniquely identifies each Server Alarm.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 2 }

avCmServerAlarmSource	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..7))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmSource
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Source
	Fld Descr:	An object that displays the abbreviated name of
			the Source which generated the alarm.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 3 }

avCmServerAlarmEventID	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..6))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmEventID
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.4
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	EvtID
	Fld Descr:	An object that displays the Event ID of the alarm.
			The Event ID is a unique number that identifies an
			alarm event on a per Source basis.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 4 }

avCmServerAlarmLevel	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..4))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmLevel
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.5
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Lvl
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the severity level of the alarm:
			Warning (WRN), Minor (MIN), or Major (MAJ).
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 5 }

avCmServerAlarmAck	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..4))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmAck
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.6
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Ack
	Fld Descr:	An object that displays Y or N, indicating whether or
			not the alarm has been acknowledged by INADS.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 6 }

avCmServerAlarmDate	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..35))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmDate
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.7
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Date
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the date the Server Alarm
			was generated.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 7 }

avCmServerAlarmDescription	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..120))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerAlarmDescription
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.2.1.1.8
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Server Alarms
	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Description
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains a description of the
			Server Alarm.
	"
    ::= { avCmServerAlarmEntry 8 }

--   ***********	 avCmConfiguration Group       **************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmConfiguration
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3
-- Description:
--		The avCmConfiguration MIB group displays the output from the
--		"list configuration all" command. The "list configuration all"
--		generates a System Configuration report which includes
--		the type, code, suffix, and vintage of the circuit packs
--		installed in the system.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or after configuration changes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		60 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of boards in the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list configuration all
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmConfiguration	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 3 }

avCmConfigurationTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmConfigurationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmConfiguration entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmConfiguration 1 }

avCmConfigurationEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmConfigurationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmConfiguration entry containing objects of the
			avCmConfiguration information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmConfigurationBoardIdx }
    ::= { avCmConfigurationTable 1 }

AvCmConfigurationEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmConfigurationBoardIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmConfigurationBoardNumber
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmConfigurationBoardType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmConfigurationCode
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmConfigurationVintage
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmConfigurationAssignedPorts
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

avCmConfigurationBoardIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..10))
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationBoardIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains that uniquely identifies
			a board based on its location in the system.  The
			syntax for the Board Number is as follows:
			cabinet(01-64):carrier(A-E):slot(01-20).
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 1 }

avCmConfigurationBoardNumber	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..8))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationBoardNumber
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Board Number
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains that uniquely identifies
			a board based on its location in the system.  The
			syntax for the Board Number is as follows:
			cabinet(01-64):carrier(A-E):slot(01-20).
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 2 }

avCmConfigurationBoardType	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..20))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationBoardType
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Board Type
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the type of board.
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 3 }

avCmConfigurationCode	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..11))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationCode
	Fld  OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.4
	Fld Form/Rpt:	SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
	Fld Format:	Multiple Field: Board Code and Board Suffix
	Fld(s) Name:	Code
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains a the board code and suffix
			of the board.
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 4 }

avCmConfigurationVintage	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..11))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationVintage
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.5
	Fld Form/Rpt:	SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Vintage
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains vintage of the board.
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 5 }

avCmConfigurationAssignedPorts	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..193))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmConfigurationPorts
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.3.1.1.6
	Fld Form/Rpt:	SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
	Fld Format:	Multiple - List of ports administered on the board.
	Fld(s) Name:	Assigned Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that specifies the assignment of the port.
			A string representing integers identical to the port
			numbers that are assigned.
			The char (u) indicates that the port is unassigned.
			The char (t) indicates that the port is assigned
			via the TTI feature.
			The char (p) indicates that the port is assigned via
			the PSA feature.
			A NULL char or string indicates that the port(s) does
			not exist or is not administered on that board.
	"
    ::= { avCmConfigurationEntry 6 }

--   ***********	 avCmServerInfo Group       **************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmServerInfo
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.4
-- Description:
--		The avCmServerInfo MIB group displays the general information
--		about the system such as Server Names, Server IP Address,
--		Server State.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than every fifteen minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		30 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
--		2. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. productid
--		2. server
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. Product ID
--		2. SERVER STATUS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--		2. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.
--		2. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   ***********	 avCmAlarms Group       **************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmAlarms
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5
-- Description:
--		The avCmAlarms MIB group displays the output of CMs Active
--		Alarm Report.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Fault
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than every 1 hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of alarms on the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display alarms
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. ALARM REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmAlarms		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 5 }

avCmAlarmsTable		OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmAlarmsEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmAlarmsTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmAlarms entries
	"
    ::= { avCmAlarms 1 }

avCmAlarmsEntry		OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmAlarmsEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmAlarmsEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An avCmAlarms entry containing objects of the
			avCmAlarms information sent by the switch
	"
    INDEX    { avCmAlarmsPortIdx, avCmAlarmsMtceNameIdx, avCmAlarmsIndex }
    ::= { avCmAlarmsTable 1 }

AvCmAlarmsEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmAlarmsPortIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsMtceNameIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsIndex
		    Integer32,
		avCmAlarmsPort
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsMtceName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsOnBrd
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsAltName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsAlarmType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsSvcState
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsAck
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsDateAlarmed
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmAlarmsDateResolved
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

avCmAlarmsPortIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..10))
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmAlarmsPortIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5.1.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing an index that uniquely
			identifies a port based on its location in the
			system.  The syntax for the Port Number is as
			follows:  cabinet(01-64):
			carrier(A-E):slot(01-20):port(01-64).
	"
    ::= { avCmAlarmsEntry 1 }

avCmAlarmsMtceNameIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..9))

    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmAlarmsMtceNameIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5.1.1.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing an index that uniquely
			identifies a Maintenance Object Name.
	"
    ::= { avCmAlarmsEntry 2 }

avCmAlarmsIndex		OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..6500)
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmAlarmsIndex
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.5.1.1.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An Integer32 object containing an index that numbers
			the alarm entry for the avCmAlarmsPortIdx.  This

-- Polling Type:

-- Polling Interval:

-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of alarms on the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display errors
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. ERROR REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.

--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..10))

	Fld Format:	Single
	Fld(s) Name:	Port
	Fld Descr:	An object that uniquely identifies a port based
			on its location in the system.  The syntax for the
			Port Number is as follows:  cabinet(01-64):
			carrier(A-E):slot(01-20):port(01-64).

    ::= { avCmErrorsEntry 4 }

--   ***********	  avCmListStation Group       **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListStation
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.7
-- Description:
--		The avCmListStation MIB group displays the output of the
--		list station command.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization 
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when stations are added.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of stations on the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list station
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. STATIONS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_3 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmListStation		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 7 }

avCmListStationTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListStationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListStationEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.7.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmServerAlarms entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListStation 1 }

avCmListStationEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListStationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListStationEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.7.1.1
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmServerAlarm entry containing objects of the
			avCmServerAlarm information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListStationIdx }
    ::= { avCmListStationTable 1 }

AvCmListStationEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmListStationIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListStationExtension
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListStationType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListStationName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListStationPort
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..17))
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerStationIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.7.1.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing an index that uniquely identifies
			an administered station.
	"
    ::= { avCmListStationEntry 1 }

--		list station xxxx count xx command. This MIB Group  should be
--		used instead of the avCmListStations MIB Group on systems
--		with over 100 stations.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when stations are added.

--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
--		2. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list station xxxxx count x
--		2. display station xxxxx
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. STATIONS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_3 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

-- ******************** avCmUpdateShow Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmUpdateShow
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.9
-- Description:
--		The avCmUpdateShow MIB Group uses the "update_show"
-- 		command to retrieve the Servers Patch information. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		60 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. update_show
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. NA
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmUpdateShow	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 9 }

avCmUpdateShowTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmUpdateShowEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmUpdateShowTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.9.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmUpdateShow entries
	"
    ::= { avCmUpdateShow 1 }

avCmUpdateShowEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmUpdateShowEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmUpdateShowEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.9.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmUpdateShow entry containing objects of the
			avCmUpdateShow information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmUpdateShowIdx }
    ::= { avCmUpdateShowTable 1 }

AvCmUpdateShowEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmUpdateShowIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmUpdateShowID
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmUpdateShowStatus
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmUpdateShowType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmUpdateShowDescription
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

	Fld OID Name:	avCmUpdateShowIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.9.1.1.1

	"
    ::= { avCmUpdateShowEntry 1 }

    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..33))

	Fld OID Name:	avCmUpdateShowID

    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..15))

-- ******************** avCmListTrunk Group *************************


-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListTrunk Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.10
-- Description:
--		The avCmListTrunk MIB Group uses the "list trunk-group"
-- 		command to retrieve the systems administered trunk group 
--		information.   In addition to list trunk information, some
--		fields from the "display trunk-group" form are displayed.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration and Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when trunk administration is 
--		changed.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of administered trunks increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
--		2. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list trunk-group
--		2. display trunk-group
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUPS 
--		2. TRUNK_GROUP 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 
--		   in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--		2. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 
--		   in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.
--		2. No special permissions needed.

avCmListTrunk	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 10 }

avCmListTrunkTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListTrunkEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListTrunkEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.10.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListTrunk entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListTrunk 1 }

avCmListTrunkEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListTrunkEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListTrunkEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.10.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListTrunk entry containing objects of the
			avCmListTrunk information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListTrunkIdx }
    ::= { avCmListTrunkTable 1 }

AvCmListTrunkEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmListTrunkIdx
		    Integer32,
		avCmListTrunkGrpNumber
		    Integer32,
		avCmListTrunkGrpType

		avCmListTrunkGrpName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListTrunkTAC
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListTrunkDirection
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListTrunkServiceType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListTrunkCommType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListTrunkTrunkType
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..2000)
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListTrunkIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.10.1.1.1

--   *********** avCmListTrunkRange Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListTrunkRange
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.11
-- Description:
--		The avCmListTrunkRange MIB group displays the output of the
--		list trunk xxxx count xx command. This MIB Group  should be
--		used instead of the avCmListTrunk MIB Group on systems
--		with over 100 trunks.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when stations are added.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
--		2. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list trunk xxxxx count x
--		2. display trunk xxxxx
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUPS
--		2. TRUNK GROUP
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_5 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--		2. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_5 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.
--		2. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

-- ******************** avCmCapacityAsai Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityAsai
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.12
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityAsai MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the ASAI capacity information
-- 		under the ADJUNCT SWITCH APPLICATION INTERFACE (ASAI) section
-- 		of the SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmCapacityBcms Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityBcms
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.13
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityBcms MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the Bcms capacity information
-- 		under the BASIC CALL MANAGEMENT SYSTEM (BCMS) section
-- 		of the SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityBcms	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 13 }

avCmCapacityBcmsMeasAgentsUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current

-- ******************** avCmCapacityDialPlan Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityDialPlan
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.15
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityDialPlan MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the DIAL PLAN capacity information
-- 		under the DIAL PLAN section of the SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityDialPlan	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 15 }

avCmCapacityDialPlanExtUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityDialPlanExtUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.15.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Extensions
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			Extensions.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityDialPlan 1 }

			Extensions.

-- ******************** avCmCapacityAnnounce Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityAnnounce
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.17
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityAnnounce MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the ANNOUNCEMENTS capacity information
-- 		under the RECORDED ANNOUNCEMENTS/MUSIC/AUDIO SOURCES section of
--		the SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityAnnounce	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 17 }

avCmCapacityAnnounceAdmAnnFileUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityAnnounceAdmAnnFileUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.17.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Administered Announcement Files
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			Administered Announcement Files.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityAnnounce 1 }

-- ******************** avCmCapacityVoiceTerm Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityVoiceTerm
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.19
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityVoiceTerm MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the STATION capacity information
-- 		under the VOICE TERMINALS section of the SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityVoiceTerm	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 19 }

avCmCapacityVoiceTermStatWithPtUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityVoiceTermStatWithPtUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.19.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Stations With Port
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			Stations With Port.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityVoiceTerm 1 }


avCmCapacityVoiceTermStatWithOutPtUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityVoiceTermStatWithOutPtUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.19.2

			Stations Without Port.

--		avCmCapacityLic

-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityLic MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the LICENSED capacity information
-- 		under the TOTAL LICENSED CAPACITY  section of the 
--		SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityLic	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 20 }

avCmCapacityLicStatTrkPtsUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityLicStatTrkPtsUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.20.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Station and Trunk Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			Station and Trunk Ports.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityLic 1 }

avCmCapacityLicStatTrkPtsAvail	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityLicStatTrkPtsAvail

	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Station and Trunk Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Available 
			Station and Trunk Ports.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityLic 2 }

			Station and Trunk Ports.

-- ******************** avCmCapacityUsage Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityUsage
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.21
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityUsage MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the USAGE capacity information
-- 		under the CONCURRENT USAGE COUNTS section of the 
--		SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityUsage	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 21 }

avCmCapacityUsageIPStatUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityUsageIPStatUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.21.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	IP Stations
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			IP Stations.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityUsage 1 }

-- ******************** avCmCapacityIPUsage Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmCapacityIPUsage
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.22
-- Description:
--		The avCmCapacityIPUsage MIB Group uses the "display capacity"
-- 		command to retrieve the  IP PORT USAGE capacity information
-- 		under the IP PORT USAGE COUNTS section of the 
--		SYSTEM CAPACITY form. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact the on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display capacity
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. System Capacity 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmCapacityIPUsage	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 22 }

avCmCapacityIPUsageTotalIpStatPtsUsed	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityIPUsageTotalIpStatPtsUsed
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.22.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Total IP Station Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Used 
			Total IP Station Ports.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityIPUsage 1 }

avCmCapacityIPUsageTotalIpStatPtsAvail	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmCapacityIPUsageTotalIpStatPtsAvail
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.22.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	System Capacity
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Total IP Station Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of Available 
			Total IP Station Ports.
	"
    ::= { avCmCapacityIPUsage 2 }

avCmCapacityIPUsageTotalIpStatPtsSysLim	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99999)

--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.24

--              trunk groups.
--
-- Releases Supported:

--		No more than once a day or when trunk members are added.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
--		2. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list member trunk 
--		2. display trunk xxxxx
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUP MEMBERS
--		2. TRUNK GROUP
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_5 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--		2. Information about trunk-groups can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_5 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.
--		2. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   *********** avCmStatusTrunk Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusTrunk
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.26
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusTrunk MIB group displays the output of the
--		status trunk xxxx command.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		The more Trunk Groups and Trunk Group Members, the less 
--		frequently this MIB Group should be queried.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--              increase as the number of trunks on the system increase.
--              Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--              very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--              and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status trunk xxxx
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUP STATUS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmStatusTrunk	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 26 }

avCmStatusTrunkGrp	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..2000)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-write
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkGrp
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.26.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the trunk group
	"

--   *********** avCmStatusTrunkMem Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusTrunkMem
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.28
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusTrunkMem MIB group displays the output of the
--		status trunk xxxx/yyy (x=group 1-2000, y=member 1-255) command.
--		This MIB group only polls 1 trunk group/member at a time.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--              No more than once every 5 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status trunk xxxx/yyy
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUP STATUS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmStatusTrunkMem	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 28 }

avCmStatusTrunkMemGrp	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..2000)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-write
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkMemGrp
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.28.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the trunk group
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusTrunkMem 1 }

avCmStatusTrunkMemMem	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (1..255)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-write
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkMemMem
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.28.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the member to perform
			status trunk on.
	"
    DEFVAL	{ 1 }
    ::= { avCmStatusTrunkMem 2 }

avCmStatusTrunkMemTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmStatusTrunkMemEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkMemTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.28.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Trunk Mem entry.
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusTrunkMem 3 }

avCmStatusTrunkMemEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmStatusTrunkMemEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkMemEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.28.4.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmStatusTrunkMem entry containing objects of the
			avCmStatusTrunkMem information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmStatusTrunkMemIdx, avCmStatusTrunkMemMemberIdx }
    ::= { avCmStatusTrunkMemTable 1 }

AvCmStatusTrunkMemEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmStatusTrunkMemIdx
		    Integer32,
                avCmStatusTrunkMemMemberIdx
                    Integer32,
                avCmStatusTrunkMemPort
                    SnmpAdminString,
                avCmStatusTrunkMemServiceState
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemMtceBusy
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemSigGrpId
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts1
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts2
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts3
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts4
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts5
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts6
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts7
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts8
                    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusTrunkMemConnPorts9
                    SnmpAdminString
		}

	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusTrunkMemIdx

-- ******************** avCmStatusHealth Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusHealth
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.29
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusHealth MIB Group uses the "status health"
-- 		command to retrieve the system health information.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration, Inventory, and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 5 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status health
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. Status Health 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmStatusHealth	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 29 }

    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusHealthAlmMaj
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.29.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	Status Health

	Fld(s) Name:	Alarms Major
	Fld Descr:	An object that contains the number of major alarms.

--   ***********	  avCmStatusStation Group       **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusStation
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.30
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusStation MIB group displays the output of the
--		status station command.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization 
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when stations are added.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of stations on the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status station
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. STATIONS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmStatusStation		OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 30 }

avCmStatusStationTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmStatusStationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusStationEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.30.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmServerAlarms entries
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusStation 1 }

avCmStatusStationEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmStatusStationEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusStationEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.30.1.1
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmStatusStation entry containing objects of the
			avCmStatusStation information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmStatusStationIdx }
    ::= { avCmStatusStationTable 1 }

AvCmStatusStationEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmStatusStationIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusStationExtension
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusStationConnType
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusStationServiceState
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmStatusStationPort
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..17))
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmServerStationIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.30.1.1.1

	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object containing an index that uniquely identifies
			an administered station.
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusStationEntry 1 }

-- ******************** avCmMeasOccSum Group *************************


-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasOccSum Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.32
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasOccSum MIB Group uses the "list measurements 
--		occupancy summary" command to retrieve the summary of
--		occupancy information.  
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour. However, the form is
--		completely updated once every 24 hours.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements occupancy summary
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. OCCUPANCY SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasOccSum	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 32 }

avCmMeasOccSumTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasOccSumEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasOccSumEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.32.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasOccSum entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasOccSum 1 }

avCmMeasOccSumEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasOccSumEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasOccSumEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.32.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasOccSum entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasOccSum information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasOccSumIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasOccSumTable 1 }

		}

--		avCmMeasOccLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.33
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasOccLstHr MIB Group uses the "list measurements 
--		occupancy last-hour" command to retrieve the occupancy data
--		from the last hour  
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 6 minutes, However, no
-- 		more than once an hour is recommended.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements occupancy last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. OCCUPANCY LAST-HOUR MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasOccBusIntvl Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.34
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasOccBusIntvl MIB Group uses the "list measurements 
--		occupancy busiest-intervals" command to retrieve the occupancy 
--		data from the busiest intervals.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements occupancy busiest intervals
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. OCCUPANCY BUSIEST 3-MINUTE INTERVALS MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasTrkGrpSumLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.35
-- Description:

--		trunk-group summary last-hour" command to retrieve trunk data 
--		from the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements trunk-group summary last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUP SUMMARY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday Group *************************


-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.36
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		trunk-group summary today-hour" command to retrieve trunk data 
--		from today.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements trunk-group summary Today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK GROUP SUMMARY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 36 }

avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.36.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday 1 }

avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.36.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasTrkGrpSumToday information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayTrunkGrpIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasTrkGrpSumTodayTable 1 }

--		trunk-group summary yesterday" command to retrieve trunk data 
--		from yesterday.
--

-- Polling Type:

-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:

--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:

-- Form/Report Name:

--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.

-- ******************** avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.38
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		outage-trunk last-hour" command to retrieve trunk outage data 
--		from the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements outage-trunk last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TRUNK OUT OF SERVICE REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 38 }

avCmMeasOutTrkLstHrTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasOutTrkLstHrEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasOutTrkLstHrEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.38.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasOutTrkLstHr 1 }

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasOutTrkYest Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.40
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasOutTrkYest MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		outage-trunk yesterday" command to retrieve trunk outage data 
--		from yesterday.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the new day.

-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:

-- Retry Interval:

--		may have some impact on the system.

-- ******************** avCmMeasSecViolationSum Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasSecViolationSum Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.44
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasSecViolationSum MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements security-violations summary" command to 
--		retrieve security violation data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements security-violations summary
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SECURITY VIOLATIONS SUMMARY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasSecViolationSum	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 44 }

avCmMeasSecViolationSumTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasSecViolationSumEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasSecViolationSumEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.44.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasSecViolationSum entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasSecViolationSum 1 }

-- ******************** avCmListConfigMedGateway Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListConfigMedGateway Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.46
-- Description:
--		The avCmListConfigMedGateway MIB Group uses the 
--		"list configuration media-gateway" command to 
-- 		retrieve media-gateway data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or after configuration changes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of boards in the system increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list configuration media-gateway
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListConfigMedGateway	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 46 }

    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListConfigMedGatewayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListConfigMedGatewayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.46.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListConfigMedGateway entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListConfigMedGateway 1 }

    DESCRIPTION
	"

	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListConfigMedGateway entry containing objects of 
			the avCmListConfigMedGateway information sent by the 
			switch.
	"
    INDEX    {avCmListConfigMedGatewayNumIdx, avCmListConfigMedGatewayBoardIdx}

	Fld Format:	Multiple - List of ports administered on the board.
	Fld(s) Name:	Assigned Ports
	Fld Descr:	An object that specifies the assignment of the port.
			A string representing integers identical to the port
			numbers that are assigned.
			The char (u) indicates that the port is unassigned.
			The char (t) indicates that the port is assigned
			via the TTI feature.
			The char (p) indicates that the port is assigned via
			the PSA feature.
			A NULL char or string indicates that the port(s) does
			not exist or is not administered on that board.
	"
    ::= { avCmListConfigMedGatewayEntry 7 }
