-- ******************** avCmListIpUnregistered Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIpUnregistered Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIpUnregistered MIB Group uses the 
--		"list multimedia ip-unregistered" command to 
-- 		retrieve unregistered end-point data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list multimedia ip-unregistered
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. UNREGISTERED IP TELEPHONES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIpUnregistered	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 48 }

avCmListIpUnregisteredTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIpUnregisteredEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListIpUnregistered entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregistered 1 }

avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListIpUnregisteredEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListIpUnregistered entry containing objects of the
			avCmListIpUnregistered information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListIpUnregisteredExtIdx }
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregisteredTable 1 }

AvCmListIpUnregisteredEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmListIpUnregisteredExtIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpUnregisteredExtension
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpUnregisteredPort
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpUnregisteredRegistered
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

avCmListIpUnregisteredExtIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..17))
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpUnregisteredExtIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1.1.1
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	An object that uniquely identifies each Increment of 
			data.
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry 1 }

avCmListIpUnregisteredExtension	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..17))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpUnregisteredExtension
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1.1.2
	Fld Form/Rpt:	UNREGISTERED IP TELEPHONES
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Extension
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Extension.
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry 2 }

avCmListIpUnregisteredPort	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..9))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpUnregisteredPort
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1.1.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:	UNREGISTERED IP TELEPHONES
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Port
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Port of the unregistered
			end-point.
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry 3 }

avCmListIpUnregisteredRegistered   OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..2))
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmListIpUnregisteredRegistered
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.48.1.1.4
        Fld Form/Rpt:   UNREGISTERED IP TELEPHONES
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Registered?
        Fld Descr:      An object containing a 'y' or 'n' value indicating
			whether the end-point is registered.
        "
    ::= { avCmListIpUnregisteredEntry 4 }


-- ******************** avCmListSurvProcess Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListSurvProcess Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.49
-- Description:
--		The avCmListSurvProcess MIB Group uses the 
--		"list survivable-processor" command to 
-- 		retrieve survivable-processor data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list survivable-processor
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SURVIVABLE PROCESSORS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListSurvProcess	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 49 }

avCmListSurvProcessTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListSurvProcessEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListSurvProcessEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.49.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListSurvProcess entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListSurvProcess 1 }

avCmListSurvProcessEntry	OBJECT-TYPE

		}

-- ******************** avCmDispSurvProcess Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmDispSurvProcess Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.50
-- Description:
--		The avCmDispSurvProcess MIB Group uses the 
--		"display survivable-processor xxx" command to 
-- 		retrieve survivable-processor data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display survivable-processor
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SURVIVABLE PROCESSORS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Information about SURVIVABLE PROCESSORS can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmDispSurvProcess	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 50 }

avCmDispSurvProcessTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmDispSurvProcessEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmDispSurvProcessEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.50.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmDispSurvProcess entries
	"
    ::= { avCmDispSurvProcess 1 }

avCmDispSurvProcessEntry        OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX      AvCmDispSurvProcessEntry

    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmDispSurvProcessEntry

        Fld Format:     NA
        Fld(s) Name:    NA
        Fld Descr:      A avCmDispSurvProcess entry containing objects of the
                        avCmDispSurvProcess information sent by the switch.

    ::= { avCmDispSurvProcessTable 1 }

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListNodeNamesAll Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.51
-- Description:
--		The avCmListNodeNamesAll MIB Group uses the 
--		"list node-names all" command to 
-- 		retrieve node name data.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list  node-names all
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. NODE NAMES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Information about NODE NAMES can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

--   ***********	  avCmListIpUnregisteredRange Group       **************

--		avCmListIpUnregisteredRange

--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.55
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIpUnregisteredRange MIB group displays the output 
--		of the list multimedia ip-unregistered xxxx count xx command. 
--		This MIB Group  should be used instead of the 
--		avCmListIpUnregistered MIB Group on systems
--		with over 100 stations.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when stations are added.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list multimedia ip-unregistered xxxxx count x
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. UNREGISTERED IP TELEPHONES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_3 and REF_DOC_5 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE 
--		   SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   ***********	 avCmMessagingAlarm Group       **************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMessagingAlarm
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.57
-- Description:
--		The avCmMessagingAlarm MIB Group displays the output of the
--		"almdisplay -chia -w" command.  The "almdisplay -chia -w"
--		displays all messaging alarms.
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Fault
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than every 20 minutes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		90 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 15 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. almdisplay -chia -w
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. Messaging Alarms
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_1 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--		   Note, no reference to "-chia" option because it is messaging.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmInitCauses Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.58
-- Description:
--		The avCmInitCauses MIB Group uses the 
--		"display initcauses" command to 
--		retrieve restart information.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		Once a minute.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		60 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display initcauses
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. INITIALIZATION CAUSES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmMeasAnnIntegAllLstHr Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.59
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasAnnIntegAllLstHr MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements announcement  integ-all  last-hour" command 
--		to retrieve measurements information for all integrated
--		announcements for the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement integ-all last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. VOICE ANNOUNCEMENT MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.60
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements announcement  integ-all  today-peak" command 
--		to retrieve measurements information for all integrated
--		announcements for today.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement integ-all today-peak
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. VOICE ANNOUNCEMENT MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 60 }

avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.60.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday 1 }

avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.60.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasAnnIntegAllToday information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayTable 1 }

		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayIdx
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayExtension

		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodaySource
		    SnmpAdminString,

		    Integer32,

		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayAllPortsBusyPeriod
		    Integer32,

		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayMeasHour
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayPlayRequests
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayCallsQueued
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayASP
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayPSP
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayQueueDrops
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllTodayMportPlays
		    Integer32,

		}

-- ******************** avCmMeasAnnIntegAllYest Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasAnnIntegAllYest Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.61
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasAnnIntegAllYest MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements announcement  integ-all  yesterday-peak" command 
--		to retrieve measurements information for all integrated
--		announcements for yesterday.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the new day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement integ-all yesterday-peak
-- Form/Report Name:

-- ******************** avCmStatusMGAnn Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusMGAnn Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.62
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusMGAnn MIB Group uses the 
--		"status mg-announcements" command 
--		to retrieve status information for all media-gateway
--		announcements.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status mg-announcements
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. MEDIA GATEWAY ANNOUNCEMENT STATUS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmStatusMGAnn	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 62 }

avCmStatusMGAnnTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmStatusMGAnnEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusMGAnnEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.62.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmStatusMGAnn entries
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusMGAnn 1 }

avCmStatusMGAnnEntry	OBJECT-TYPE

			avCmStatusMGAnn information sent by the switch.

    INDEX    { avCmStatusMGAnnIdx }

		}

-- ******************** avCmListIntegAnn Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIntegAnn Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.63
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIntegAnn MIB Group uses the 
--		"list integrated-annc-boards" command 
--		to retrieve information for all integrated announcements.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--              No more than once a day or after announcement changes.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list integrated-annc-boards
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. INTEGRATED ANNOUNCEMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. Informations about INTEGRATED ANNOUNCEMENTS can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
--
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIntegAnn	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 63 }

avCmListIntegAnnTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIntegAnnEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitter Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitter
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.64
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitter MIB group displays the output of 
--		the list measurements ip voice-stats hourly jitter command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats hourly jitter
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION JITTER REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitter	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 64 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitterTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitterEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatHrJitterTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.64.1

	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA

	"

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatHrPkLos Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatHrPkLos
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.65
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatHrPkLos MIB group displays the output of 
--		the list measurements ip voice-stats hourly pktloss command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats hourly pktloss
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION PKTLOSS REPORT
-- Reference Document:

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatHrRtdel Group **************
-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatHrRtdel
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.66
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatHrRtdel MIB group displays the output of 
--		the list measurements ip voice-stats hourly rtdelay command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats hourly rtdelay
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION RTDELAY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatHrRtdel	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 66 }

    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatHrRtdelEntry

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.67
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData MIB group displays the output of 
--		the list measurements ip voice-stats hourly data command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats hourly data
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION DATA REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 67 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.67.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData 1 }

    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION

	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataEntry

	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData entry containing objects of 
			the avCmMeasIpVoStatHrData information sent by the 
			switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataRegIdx, avCmMeasIpVoStatHrDataHourIdx,

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterLstHr Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterLstHr
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.68
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterLstHr MIB group displays the 
--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter 
--		last-hour" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		NETWORK REGION MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY JITTER REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterToday Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterToday
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.69
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterToday MIB group displays the 
--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter 
--		today" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		NETWORK REGION MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY JITTER REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 69 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterTodayTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.69.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMemTrunk entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterToday 1 }

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.70
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest MIB group displays the 
--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter 
--		yesterday" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		NETWORK REGION MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--              No more than once a day because the data is only updated
--              after the beginning of the day which is midnight.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary jitter yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY JITTER REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 70 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.70.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMemTrunk entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest 1 }

    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.70.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest entry containing 
			objects of the avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYest 
			information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX {avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestRegIdx, 
		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestHourIdx,
			avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestIdx }

                    SnmpAdminString,

                    SnmpAdminString,
                avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestCallingNum
                    SnmpAdminString,
                avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestCalledNum
                    SnmpAdminString,

                    Integer32,
                avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestCodec

                    Integer32,

                avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestBufSize
                    SnmpAdminString,
                avCmMeasIpVoStatSumJitterYestBufOrn

-- Description:

--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss 
--		last-hour" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		SUMMARY MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:

-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY PKTLOSS REPORT

--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosToday Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosToday
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.72
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosToday MIB group displays the 
--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss 
--		today" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		SUMMARY MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY PKTLOSS REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 72 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosTodayTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.72.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMemTrunk entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosToday 1 }

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosYest Group **************

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosYest
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.73
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosYest MIB group displays the 
--		output of the "list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss 
--		yesterday" command  for each network-region administered on the 
--		SUMMARY MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary pktloss yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY PKTLOSS REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 73 }

    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumPkLosYestEntry

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday Group **************
-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.75
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday MIB group displays the 
--		output of the list measurements ip voice-stats  summary rtdelay
--		today command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary rtdelay today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION RTDELAY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 75 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelTodayTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.75.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday entries.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelToday 1 }

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest Group **************
-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.76
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest MIB group displays the 
--		output of the list measurements ip voice-stats  summary rtdelay
--		yesterday command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary rtdelay yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS NETWORK REGION RTDELAY REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 76 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYestTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYestTable

	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest entries.
	"

			the avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYest information sent by the 
			switch.

				avCmMeasIpVoStatSumRtdelYestHourIdx,

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataLstHr
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.77
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataLstHr MIB group displays the 
--		output of the list measurements ip voice-stats  summary data
--		last-hour command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization

--		No more than once an hour.

-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.

-- Limitations:

--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataToday Group **************
-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataToday
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.78
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataToday MIB group displays the 
--		output of the list measurements ip voice-stats  summary data
--		today command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary data today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY DATA REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

--   *********** avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYest Group **************
-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYest
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.79
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYest MIB group displays the 
--		output of the list measurements ip voice-stats  summary data
--		yesterday command 
--              for each network-region administered on the NETWORK REGION 
--		MEASUREMENT SELECTION form.
--
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements ip voice-stats summary data yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP VOICE STATISTICS SUMMARY DATA REPORT
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in REF_DOC_4 in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed. Default customer super-user
--		   profile can access this command.

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 79 }

avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYestTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYestTable
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.79.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the AvCmMeasIpVoStatSumDataYest entries.

-- ******************** avCmMeasAnnAllLstHr Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasAnnAllLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.80
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasAnnAllLstHr MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements announcement all last-hour" command to 
--		retrieve measurements information for all announcement 
--		information for the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement all last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. VOICE ANNOUNCEMENT MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasAnnAllLstHr	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 80 }

avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.80.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasAnnAllLstHr entries

        Fld(s) Name:    ASP
        Fld Descr:      An object containing from time waiting for announcement
			to play to when it starts playing in seconds averaged 
			over the period.  Calls abandoned while in the waiting 
			for announcement port queue are not to be included.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry 8 }

        Fld Descr:      An object containing the peak speed to play an 
			announcement.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry 9 }


avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrQueueDrops OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX      Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrQueueDrops
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.80.1.1.10
        Fld Form/Rpt:   VOICE ANNOUNCEMENT MEASUREMENTS
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Queue Drops
        Fld Descr:      An object containing - count of the individual calls 
			that had to queue but dropped while waiting during the 
			period - this includes calls abandoned by the caller 
			and VOA (VDN of origin Announcements) aborts but should 
			exclude calls that were waiting but answered by an 
			agent.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry 10 }

    SYNTAX      Integer32 (0..99999)
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only

        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Mport Plays
        Fld Descr:      An object containing - count of how many times the 
			announcement is being played out of more than one port 
			at the same time during the period.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry 11 }

        Fld(s) Name:    Mx Pt
        Fld Descr:      An object containing the peak number of ports used for 
			the announcement during the period.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllLstHrEntry 12 }

-- ******************** avCmMeasAnnAllToday Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasAnnAllToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.81
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasAnnAllToday MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements announcement all today-peak" command to 
--		retrieve measurements information for all announcement 
--		information for the current day.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		after the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement all today-peak
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. VOICE ANNOUNCEMENT MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasAnnAllToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 81 }

avCmMeasAnnAllTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasAnnAllTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasAnnAllTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.81.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasAnnAllToday entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasAnnAllToday 1 }

--		"list measurements announcement all yesterday-peak" command to 
--		retrieve measurements information for all announcement 
--		information for the previous day.
--

--		after the beginning of the new day.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:

--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:

-- Command:
--		1. list measurements announcement all yesterday-peak

--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.

--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmPlatCmds  Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.83
-- Description:
--		The avCmPlatCmds  MIB Group uses the 
--		"logc cmds"  command to 
--		retrieve bash command information.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour. 
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. BASH
-- Command:
--		1. logc cmds
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. Command History
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmListSigGrp Group *************************


-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListSigGrp Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.84
-- Description:
--		The avCmListSigGrp MIB Group uses the "list signaling-group"
-- 		command to retrieve the systems administered signaling group 
--		information. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration and Inventory
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a day or when signaling administration is 
--		changed.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of administered signaling-groups 
--		increase. Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group 
--		could be very large and therefore may take a very long time to 
--		collect	and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list signaling-group
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. SIGNALING GROUPS 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListSigGrp	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 84 }

avCmListSigGrpTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListSigGrpEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"

	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.84.1

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusSigGrp Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.85
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusSigGrp MIB Group uses the 
--		"status  signaling-group" command to retrieve signaling-group 
--		status information. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Configuration and Performance
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour or when signaling administration is 
--		changed.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will increase 
--		as the number of administered signaling-groups increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status signaling-group
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. STATUS SIGNALING GROUP 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

--		CM6.3.100 and greater

--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:

-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements hunt-group last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

	Fld Descr:	The total time (in CCS) the hunt group extensions are 
			not in use but are available to receive hunt group 
			calls during the measurement hour. Time Available
			is calculated only when an agent (extension) is ready 
			to receive calls from the specified hunt group.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrEntry 12 }

	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Speed Ans
	Fld Descr:	Speed of Answer (seconds). The average time interval 
			(in seconds) from when the call first enters the hunt 
			group or hunt group queue until the call is answered by
			a hunt group member. This does not include the time 
			taken by a forced first announcement.
			
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrEntry 13 }

	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Typ
	Fld Descr:	Identifies one of the following type of hunt group:
			- ddc: direct department calling
			- ucd: uniform call distribution
			- ead: expert agent distribution
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrEntry 14 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrAban	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..999)

    STATUS	current

	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrAban
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.87.1.1.15
	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Aban
	Fld Descr:	The total number of calls which attempt to reach the 
			hunt group but abandon the attempt before being 
			answered. Calls might abandon either while in the hunt 
			group queue or while ringing a hunt group extension. 
			This total does not include calls answered by Call 
			Pick Up, other hunt groups, or calls abandoned while 
			listening to a forced first announcement.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpLstHrEntry 15 }

-- ******************** avCmMeasHuntGrpToday Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasHuntGrpToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.88
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasHuntGrpToday MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		hunt-group today" command to retrieve hunt-group data 
--		from the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements hunt-group today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasHuntGrpToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 88 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasHuntGrpTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.88.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasHuntGrpToday entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpToday 1 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasHuntGrpTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.88.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasHuntGrpToday entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasHuntGrpToday information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayHuntGrpIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpTodayTable 1 }

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasHuntGrpYest Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.89
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasHuntGrpYest MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		hunt-group yesterday" command to retrieve hunt-group data 
--		from the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group

	Fld(s) Name:	Calls Que
	Fld Descr:	Total number of calls that arrive to find all members 
			of the hunt group busy and are placed in the hunt group
			queue. Calls Queued includes all calls that go to 
			coverage
			
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 10 }

	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Que Ovfl
	Fld Descr:	The number of calls that arrive when all slots in the 
			hunt group queue are occupied.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 11 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpYestTimeAvail	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpYestTimeAvail
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.89.1.1.12
	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Time Avail
	Fld Descr:	The total time (in CCS) the hunt group extensions are 
			not in use but are available to receive hunt group 
			calls during the measurement hour. Time Available
			is calculated only when an agent (extension) is ready 
			to receive calls from the specified hunt group.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 12 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpYestSpeedAns	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpYestSpeedAns
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.89.1.1.13
	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Speed Ans
	Fld Descr:	Speed of Answer (seconds). The average time interval 
			(in seconds) from when the call first enters the hunt 
			group or hunt group queue until the call is answered by
			a hunt group member. This does not include the time 
			taken by a forced first announcement.
			
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 13 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpYestTyp	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..4))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpYestTyp
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.89.1.1.14
	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Typ
	Fld Descr:	Identifies one of the following type of hunt group:
			- ddc: direct department calling
			- ucd: uniform call distribution
			- ead: expert agent distribution
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 14 }

avCmMeasHuntGrpYestAban	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasHuntGrpYestAban
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.89.1.1.15
	Fld Form/Rpt:	HUNT GROUP MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Aban
	Fld Descr:	The total number of calls which attempt to reach the 
			hunt group but abandon the attempt before being 
			answered. Calls might abandon either while in the hunt 
			group queue or while ringing a hunt group extension. 
			This total does not include calls answered by Call 
			Pick Up, other hunt groups, or calls abandoned while 
			listening to a forced first announcement.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasHuntGrpYestEntry 15 }


-- ******************** avCmListIpInterfaceAll Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIpInterfaceAll Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.90
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIpInterfaceAll MIB Group uses the "list ip-interface
--		all" command to retrieve all ip-interface data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list ip-interface all
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP INTERFACES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIpInterfaceAll	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 90 }

avCmListIpInterfaceAllTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIpInterfaceAllEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpInterfaceAllEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.90.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListIpInterfaceAll entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpInterfaceAll 1 }

	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListIpInterfaceAll entry containing objects of the
			avCmListIpInterfaceAll information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListIpInterfaceAllSlotIdx, avCmListIpInterfaceAllIdx }
    ::= { avCmListIpInterfaceAllTable 1 }

-- ****************** avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.91
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro MIB Group uses the 
--		"list ip-interface medpro" command to retrieve media-processor
--		 ip-interface data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list ip-interface medpro
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP INTERFACES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 91 }

avCmListIpInterfaceMedproTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIpInterfaceMedproEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpInterfaceMedproEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.91.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro 1 }

avCmListIpInterfaceMedproEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListIpInterfaceMedproEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpInterfaceMedproEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.91.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro entry containing objects of the
			avCmListIpInterfaceMedpro information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListIpInterfaceMedproSlotIdx, avCmListIpInterfaceMedproIdx }
    ::= { avCmListIpInterfaceMedproTable 1 }

-- ****************** avCmStatusMedproBrd Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusMedproBrd Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.92
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusMedproBrd MIB Group uses the 
--		"list ip-interface medpro" command to retrieve media-processor
--		 ip-interface status data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		300 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of administered ip-interface 
--		media-processors  increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
--		and could impact system performance.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status media-processor board
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. MEDIA-PROCESSOR STATUS 
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmStatusMedproBrd	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 92 }

avCmStatusMedproBrdTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmStatusMedproBrdEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatusMedproBrdEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.92.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmStatusMedproBrd entries
	"
    ::= { avCmStatusMedproBrd 1 }

-- ******************** avCmListIpServerIntf Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIpServerIntf Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.93
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIpServerIntf MIB Group uses the "list 
--		ipserver-interface" command to retrieve all ip-interface data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Configuration.
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list  ipserver-interface
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. IP SERVER INTERFACE INFORMATION
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIpServerIntf	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 93 }

avCmListIpServerIntfTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIpServerIntfEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpServerIntfEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.93.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListIpServerIntf entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListIpServerIntf 1 }

avCmListIpServerIntfEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListIpServerIntfEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIpServerIntfEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.93.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListIpServerIntf entry containing objects of the
			avCmListIpServerIntf information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListIpServerIntfIdx }
    ::= { avCmListIpServerIntfTable 1 }

AvCmListIpServerIntfEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmListIpServerIntfIdx
		    Integer32,
		avCmListIpServerIntfPortNtwkNum
		    Integer32,
		avCmListIpServerIntfPriBdLoc
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfPrimaryIPAddress
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfPrimaryHostName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfPrimaryDHCPID
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfServState
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfControlState 
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfStateOfHealthCPEG
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryBdLoc
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryIPAddress
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryHostName
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryDHCPID
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryServState
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryControlState
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmListIpServerIntfSecondaryStateOfHealth
		    SnmpAdminString
		}

-- ******************** avCmStatusLink Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatusLink Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.94
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatusLink MIB Group uses the "status 
--		link" command to retrieve link status data
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once  an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status link 1-254 or 'procr'
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1.  LINK/PORT STATUS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

-- ******************** avCmListIPNetRegMonitor Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmListIPNetRegMonitor Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.95
-- Description:
--		The avCmListIPNetRegMonitor MIB Group uses the "list 
--		ip-network-region monitor" command to retrieve all network-
--		region monitor related data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Configuration.
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily or when administration is changed.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list ip-network-region monitor
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1.  IP NETWORK REGIONS MONITOR
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_3 and REF_DOC_5
--		   in the DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmListIPNetRegMonitor	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 95 }

avCmListIPNetRegMonitorTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.95.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmListIPNetRegMonitor entries
	"
    ::= { avCmListIPNetRegMonitor 1 }

avCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.95.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmListIPNetRegMonitor entry containing objects of the
			avCmListIPNetRegMonitor information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmListIPNetRegMonitorIdx }
    ::= { avCmListIPNetRegMonitorTable 1 }

AvCmListIPNetRegMonitorEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmListIPNetRegMonitorIdx
		    Integer32,

-- ******************** avCmStatIpNetRegion Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmStatIpNetRegion Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.96
-- Description:
--		The avCmStatIpNetRegion MIB Group uses the "status 
--		ip-network-region" command to retrieve all network-
--		region related data. 
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 45 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Red/High - The data collected by this MIB Group will
--		increase as the number of administered ip-interface 
--		media-processors  increase.
--		Consequently the data collected by this MIB Group could be
--		very large and therefore may take a very long time to collect
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. status ip-network-region 1-2000
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1.  Inter Network Region Bandwidth Status
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_1 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmStatIpNetRegion	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 96 }

avCmStatIpNetRegionTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmStatIpNetRegionEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmStatIpNetRegionEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.96.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmStatIpNetRegion entries
	"
    ::= { avCmStatIpNetRegion 1 }

avCmStatIpNetRegionEntry	OBJECT-TYPE

    DESCRIPTION
	"

	Fld Form/Rpt:	NA
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmStatIpNetRegion entry containing objects of the
			avCmStatIpNetRegion information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmStatIpNetRegionSrcRegIdx, avCmStatIpNetRegionDstRegIdx }
    ::= { avCmStatIpNetRegionTable 1 }

-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecLstHr Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.97
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecLstHr MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		tone-receiver detail last-hour" command to retrieve tone 
--		receiver data from the last hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver detail last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.
