-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecToday Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.98
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecToday MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		tone-receiver detail today" command to retrieve tone-receiver
--		data for the peak hour of the current day.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver detail today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasToneRecToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 98 }

avCmMeasToneRecTodayTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.98.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasToneRecToday entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecToday 1 }

avCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.98.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasToneRecToday entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasToneRecToday information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasToneRecTodayPnIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecTodayTable 1 }

AvCmMeasToneRecTodayEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayPnIdx
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayPNNumber
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayRunDate
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayMeasHour
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayDTMFPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayDTMFPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayDTMFPkAlloc 
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayDTMFTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayDTMFPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayGPTDPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayGPTDPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayGPTDPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayGPTDTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayGPTDPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCTTRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCTTRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCTRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCTTRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCTTRPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCCPTRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCCPTRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCCPTRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCCPTRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCCPTRPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCMFCRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCMFCRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCMFCRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCMFCRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecTodayCCMFCRPkOffPN
		    Integer32
		}

avCmMeasToneRecTodayPnIdx	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..99)
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecTodayPnIdx
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.98.1.1.1

-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecYest Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecYest Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.99
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecYest MIB Group uses the "list measurements
--		tone-receiver detail yesterday" command to retrieve peak
--		hour tone-receiver data for yesterday.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once a daily because the data is only updated
--		at the beginning of the day after midnight.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver detail yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasToneRecYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 99 }

avCmMeasToneRecYestTable	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SEQUENCE OF AvCmMeasToneRecYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecYestEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.99.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A list of the avCmMeasToneRecYest entries
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecYest 1 }

avCmMeasToneRecYestEntry	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	AvCmMeasToneRecYestEntry
    MAX-ACCESS	not-accessible
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecYestEntry
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.99.1.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER DETAIL MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	NA
	Fld(s) Name:	NA
	Fld Descr:	A avCmMeasToneRecYest entry containing objects of the
			avCmMeasToneRecYest information sent by the switch.
	"
    INDEX    { avCmMeasToneRecYestPnIdx }
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecYestTable 1 }

AvCmMeasToneRecYestEntry ::= SEQUENCE {
		avCmMeasToneRecYestPnIdx
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestPNNumber
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestRunDate
		    SnmpAdminString,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestMeasHour
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestDTMFPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestDTMFPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestDTMFPkAlloc 
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestDTMFTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestDTMFPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestGPTDPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestGPTDPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestGPTDPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestGPTDTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestGPTDPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCTTRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCTTRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCTRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCTTRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCTTRPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCCPTRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCCPTRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCCPTRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCCPTRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCCPTRPkOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCMFCRPnReq
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCMFCRPnAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCMFCRPkAlloc
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCMFCRTotOffPN
		    Integer32,
		avCmMeasToneRecYestCCMFCRPkOffPN
		    Integer32
		}

-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.100
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements tone-receiver summary last-hour" command to 
--		retrieve tone-receiver data from the listed hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver summary last-hour
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 100 }

avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrRunDate	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..28))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrRunDate
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.100.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Date
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Date the command was executed.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr 1 }


avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrMeasHour   OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrMeasHour
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.100.2
        Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Hour
        Fld Descr:      An object containing the Hour the measurement was taken.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr 2 }


avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrDTMFHour 	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHrDTMFHour
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.100.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	DTMF Hour
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the hour the measurement was
			taken.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumLstHr 3 }

-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecSumToday Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecSumToday Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.101
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecSumToday MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements tone-receiver summary today" command to 
--		retrieve tone-receiver data from the listed hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once an hour because the data is only updated
--		near the beginning of the hour.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver summary today
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasToneRecSumToday	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 101 }

avCmMeasToneRecSumTodayRunDate	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..28))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumTodayRunDate
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.101.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Date
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Date the command was executed.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumToday 1 }


avCmMeasToneRecSumTodayMeasHour   OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmMeasToneRecSumTodayMeasHour
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.101.2
        Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Hour
        Fld Descr:      An object containing the Hour the measurement was taken.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumToday 2 }

    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only

    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumTodayDTMFHour
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.101.3

-- ******************** avCmMeasToneRecSumYest Group *************************
-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmMeasToneRecSumYest Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.102
-- Description:
--		The avCmMeasToneRecSumYest MIB Group uses the 
--		"list measurements tone-receiver summary yesterday" command to 
--		retrieve tone-receiver data from the listed hour.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Performance/Utilization
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily because the data is only updated
--		at midnight.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--		Yellow/Medium - The data collected by this MIB Group
--		may have some impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. list measurements tone-receiver summary yesterday
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_4 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmMeasToneRecSumYest	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 102 }

avCmMeasToneRecSumYestRunDate	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..28))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumYestRunDate
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.102.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Date
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the Date the command was executed.
	"
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumYest 1 }


avCmMeasToneRecSumYestMeasHour   OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	Integer32 (0..9999)
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmMeasToneRecSumYestMeasHour
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.102.2
        Fld Form/Rpt:   TONE RECEIVER SUMMARY MEASUREMENTS
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Hour
        Fld Descr:      An object containing the Hour the measurement was taken.
        "
    ::= { avCmMeasToneRecSumYest 2 }

    MAX-ACCESS	read-only

    DESCRIPTION

	Fld OID Name:	avCmMeasToneRecSumYestDTMFHour
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.102.3

-- ******************** avCmSysParamCust Group *************************

-- MIB GROUP DESCRIPTION

-- MIB Group Name:
--		avCmSysParamCust Group
-- OID:
--		enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.103
-- Description:
--		The avCmSysParamCust MIB Group uses the 
--		"display system-parameters customer-options" command to 
--		retrieve customer options data indicating whether a small
--		selection of features is activated.
--		
-- Releases Supported:
--		CM6.3.100 and greater
-- Polling Type:
--		Inventory and Configuration
-- Polling Interval:
--		No more than once daily.
-- Default Caching Interval
-- 		600 seconds
-- Timeout Interval:
--		Initial Timeout should be set to 20 seconds.
-- Retry Interval:
--		Initial Retry should be set to 3.
-- Limitations:
--              Green/Low - The data collected by this MIB Group
--              is minimal and therefore has a low impact on the system.
-- Command Type:
--		1. SAT
-- Command:
--		1. display system-parameters customer-options
-- Form/Report Name:
--		1. OPTIONAL FEATURES
-- Reference Document:
--		1. A detailed description of the command and form can be
--		   found in document referenced by REF_DOC_5 in the
--		   DOCUMENT REFERENCE SECTION.
-- Command Permission/User-profile:
--		1. No special permissions needed.

avCmSysParamCust	OBJECT IDENTIFIER ::= { avCmObjects 103 }

avCmSysParamCustPlat	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..6))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmSysParamCustPlat
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.103.1
	Fld Form/Rpt:   OPTIONAL FEATURES
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Platform
	Fld Descr:	An object containing the platform of the server. 
	"
    ::= { avCmSysParamCust 1 }


avCmSysParamCustESS   OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..2))
    MAX-ACCESS  read-only
    STATUS      current
    DESCRIPTION
        "
        Fld OID Name:   avCmSysParamCustESS
        Fld OID:        enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.103.2
        Fld Form/Rpt:   OPTIONAL FEATURES
        Fld Format:     Single Field
        Fld(s) Name:    Enterprise Survivable Server
        Fld Descr:      An object containing whether the Enterprise Survivable 
			Server feature is enabled (enabled=y. disabled=n).
        "
    ::= { avCmSysParamCust 2 }


avCmSysParamCustLSP 	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..2))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmSysParamCustLSP
	Fld OID:	enterprises.6889.2.73.8.1.103.3
	Fld Form/Rpt:   OPTIONAL FEATURES
	Fld Format:	Single Field
	Fld(s) Name:	Local Survivable Processor
	Fld Descr:	An object containing whether the Local Survivable 
			Processor feature is enabled (enabled=y. disabled=n).
	"
    ::= { avCmSysParamCust 3 }

avCmSysParamCustTenantPart	OBJECT-TYPE
    SYNTAX	SnmpAdminString (SIZE (0..2))
    MAX-ACCESS	read-only
    STATUS	current
    DESCRIPTION
	"
	Fld OID Name:	avCmSysParamCustTenantPart
